kennelTipLean.note: Nobody's tipping us. The Tracey backlash is so bad people stopped reading the team list at #1 and the GAMEDAY thread is already a wake.

kennelTipQuotes.quote: Mr Shhh: stopped reading after Connor Tracey. That's the whole preview lads.

debates.question: Tracey's named at fullback again — does Ciraldo hook him before halftime?
debates.kennel: The Tracey-Time-To-Go thread is 198 deep and the GAMEDAY thread is unreadable for the Tracey hate.

options.label: Yes — Mann shifts to fullback before the break
Mid-game shuffle — Crichton goes to fullback, Tracey to centre

debates.question: Talakai's on the Sharks bench — who copes when he runs at our edge?
debates.kennel: DogsOfWar1704 reckons Xerri has to mark him or we get steamrolled.

options.label: Xerri shuts him down — under 100m run
Talakai bullies us — 150m+ and a try assist
He barely features — Sharks don't need him

trivia.question: Which Bulldogs legend captained the club to back-to-back grand finals in 1994 and 1995, winning the 1995 premiership?
trivia.explainer: Terry Lamb led the Dogs to the 1994 GF (lost to Canberra) and the 1995 ARL premiership over Manly — his last and most famous as captain.

recap.question: Who topped the Dogs for tackles in the Dolphins loss?
recap.explainer: Sitili made 42 tackles — the only Dog who genuinely turned up to that side of the ball.

washup.headline: 44-12. That's not a loss, that's a public execution.
washup.vibe: We completed at 75% and missed 40 tackles. Isaako put 4 line breaks through us on his own and ran for 261m like we weren't there. Salmon got the opener and Critta crossed but it was 12-all and then the wheels fell off, axle and all. 13th on the ladder with the season slipping out the door.
washup.kennelSummary: The GAMEDAY thread became a Ciraldo-out rally by full-time. Tracey took the biggest hit with multiple sack threads, Salmon at 13 got savaged, and Hayward at 9 isn't far behind. Nate DAWG called the 4-hour meltdown timer and it absolutely landed.

kennelHotTakes.quote: Imposter404: that is the most pathetic fullback performance i have seen from a Bulldogs fullback. Full stop.
kennelHotTakes.author: Imposter404

kennelThreadsThisWeek.title: Round 11 vs Sharks Friday 6pm Suncorp (Magic Round)
kennelThreadsThisWeek.summary: GAMEDAY thread already 775 deep and half of it is people refusing to read past Tracey at fullback. DogsOfWar reckons Xerri needs to mark Talakai or we're cooked.

kennelThreadsLastGame.title: Tracey?Time to go
kennelThreadsLastGame.summary: Pile-on after his Dolphins performance. Imposter404 called it the most pathetic fullback display he's seen from a Dogs #1, and people want Crichton shifted to the back.
